news.headline: Oscar Mayer brings back the iconic Bologna jingle after 50 years, the longest-running jingle in ad history. Sing along and win.
news.summary: In 1974, Oscar Mayer debuted the iconic commercial "The Bologna song," which taught Americans nationwide how to spell B-O-L-O-G-N-A. Now, 50 years later, the company is reintroducing the ad, the longest-running jingle in advertising history. Fans who sing along will be rewarded in celebration. The nostalgic commercial features the same '70s camera quality and original lyrics for fans to enjoy. Oscar Mayer re-aired "The Bologna song" as a tribute to its enduring popularity.

news.headline: Redwire expands to Warsaw, opens regional office, welcomes new GM, to provide space solutions globally. #RDW #spaceeconomy
news.summary: Redwire Corporation, a prominent player in space infrastructure for the upcoming space economy, has unveiled a new regional office in Warsaw. This move marks an expansion of the company's European presence with the aim to offer top-notch space solutions to a worldwide clientele. The Poland office of Redwire will play a significant role by providing specification and design services, along with assembly, integration, and testing (AI&T) support for the company's International Berthing and Docking Mechanisms. Redwire Corporation trades on NYSE under the ticker symbol RDW.

news.headline: Innovex acquires Downhole Well Solutions, closing a deal worth millions.
Study by Wood Mackenzie commissioned by ANGEA shows Asia's coal emissions will surge without more US LNG supply.
news.summary: Singapore - A recent study by the data and analytics firm Wood Mackenzie, commissioned by the Asia Natural Gas & Energy Association (ANGEA), indicates a concerning trend in Asia’s energy sector. The study predicts a substantial rise in coal use and emissions from power generation in the region over the next few decades. This escalation could be mitigated by a considerable increase in U.S. liquefied natural gas (LNG) supply. The study, which models energy demand, power generation, and gas demand for Asian countries until 2050, emphasizes the urgent need for alternative energy sources. The findings highlight the necessity of expanded LNG production to curb the burgeoning reliance on coal and reduce emissions in the region.

news.headline: Aramco buys 10% of Horse Powertrain Limited.
SEACOR Marine refinanced $391M debt, ordered 2 PSVs for $41M each, sold 2 AHTS vessels for $22.5M.
news.summary: SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. has secured a new senior secured term loan of up to $391.0 million with EnTrust Global and signed agreements for constructing two platform supply vessels at $41.0 million each. The vessels are 4,650 tons deadweight with energy-efficient features. The loan consolidates the Company's debt structure into a single credit facility, maturing in Q4 2029 and financing the new vessels. Additionally, the Company will sell two AHTS vessels for $22.5 million total.

news.headline: Global Quaternary Ammonium Salts Market to hit $1,930.1M at 5.9% CAGR by 2034, up from $1,088.0M in 2024; North America leads with a 32.5% market share by 2024. Key players include Arkema S.A., BASF, Clariant AG, Evonik Industries AG, KLK Oleo. Market growth attributed to rising demand for sanitizers and disinfectants.
news.summary: The global Quaternary Ammonium Salts Market is currently valued at US$1,088.0 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 5.9% from 2024 to 2034. The market is witnessing an increase in demand due to heightened consumer awareness about safety and cleanliness, especially following recent global health crises. Quaternary ammonium compounds are essential for hygiene and infection control in various sectors such as personal care, healthcare, and industrial applications. Major markets for these salts are emerging in regions like North America and South Asia Pacific due to the growing need for cleaning and hygiene products. The market study reveals that North America is expected to hold a market share of 32.5% in 2024, with an absolute opportunity of US$280.4 million from 2024 to 2034. Key players in the market include Arkema S.A., BASF, Clariant AG, Evonik Industries AG, and KLK Oleo. The market is rapidly evolving, presenting manufacturers with opportunities to align with sustainability goals and respond to changing customer preferences.

news.headline: Benedicte Schilbred Fasmer begins as Telenor's CEO today, focusing on Nordics and Asia.
news.summary: Benedicte Schilbred Fasmer is beginning her role as CEO of Telenor in Fornebu, Norway today, December 2, 2024. She is actively engaging with Telenor's teams and operations in the Nordics and Asia as she takes on this leadership position.

news.headline: Agora, Inc. in Santa Clara, CA (NASDAQ: API) reported senior management voluntarily locked up shares until Dec. 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on December 2, 2024, Agora, Inc. (NASDAQ: API) revealed that its senior management team has opted to enter a lock-up period starting today until December 31, 2025. Agora, Inc. is known for its real-time engagement technology and is considered a frontrunner in this sector. This decision by the senior management team implies a commitment to the Company for a significant period, reinforcing their dedication to the organization's future.

news.headline: Immuron CEO to speak at Small Cap Growth Virtual Investor Conference on Dec 5th; Steven Lydeamore presenting at 2:30pm EST.

news.headline: DeepHealth, a RadNet subsidiary, unveils AI solutions at RSNA 2024 for imaging diagnosis & health screening ops.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, DeepHealth, Inc., a leading AI-powered health informatics company and a subsidiary of RadNet, Inc. (Nasdaq: RDNT), unveiled new AI-driven solutions at RSNA 2024. These innovations facilitate advancements in imaging-based diagnosis, population health screening programs, and streamlined large-scale imaging operations. The introduction of SmartTechnology™ solutions integrates cutting-edge AI and informatics with imaging systems to enhance efficiency and patient-centered workflows. Centered around the cloud-based DeepHealth OS, this robust product lineup aims to boost operational efficiency, increase clinical confidence, and enhance patient and care team experiences. DeepHealth has forged strategic partnerships with key players in healthcare, medical imaging, AI, and cloud services to continually pioneer solutions, business strategies, and transformative care models, with the goal of catalyzing breakthroughs in healthcare by unlocking the full potential of imaging technology.

news.headline: LNG Energy Group releases Q3 2024 financial results, mentioning TSXV: LNGE and TSXV: LNGE.WT, filing interim unaudited statements and management analysis for three and nine months ending Sept 30, 2024.

As of November 30, 2024, Digihost reported impressive results from its innovative energy infrastructure and data center operations. The company's BTC production numbers for the mentioned month have been described as promising, marking a significant milestone in their operational endeavors. All financial figures mentioned are in USD currency, and the company is pleased to share these comparative production outcomes with the public.

news.headline: Apogee Therapeutics presents promising data for biologic drug APG808 showing good tolerability and long half-life of 55 days, supporting potential for 2-3 month dosing.
news.summary: Promising results from the interim Phase 1 study show that APG808 was well-received with a half-life of around 55 days. This suggests the possibility of dosing every 2 to 3 months. The data also revealed significant and lasting suppression of biomarkers, indicating potential effectiveness of the treatment.

This move is aimed at strengthening their presence in the region. The collaboration will involve key locations such as Toronto and Puerto Vallarta in Mexico, as well as Frankfurt in Germany. The announcement was made on December 2, 2024. This strategic decision highlights SDC's commitment to tapping into the retail market in these areas and enhancing their consumer relationships.

news.headline: Shawmut Design and Construction expands NYC team for market growth amid positive economy, hires new experts.
news.summary: Shawmut Design and Construction, a top player in the national construction industry with a revenue of $2 billion, has recently welcomed a group of new hires boasting a wealth of expertise in commercial, healthcare, and large vertical projects. This strategic move comes as the company looks to expand its market presence in light of a promising economic outlook. The additions to the team are expected to strengthen Shawmut's capabilities and further solidify its position in the industry. The firm is optimistic about the growth opportunities that lie ahead as they capitalize on the improving economic conditions.

news.headline: reDesign launches CBE Catalyst, an online platform for educators to implement competency-based learning.
news.summary: reDesign, an organization promoting learner-centered education, has unveiled CBE Catalyst to empower a group of educators in driving competency-based learning in their school or district. The program is designed to provide comprehensive support and resources to facilitate this transition. The initiative was launched in Boston on December 2, 2024, and is set to revolutionize education practices.

news.headline: Wine matriarch Maddalena Riboli passes at 102, remembered for transforming California's wine industry. LOS ANGELES, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 2, 2024, the late Maddalena Riboli, who would have turned 102 soon, is being honored for her pioneering role in revolutionizing California's wine industry. She is celebrated as a visionary who shattered gender roles and always pursued her aspirations with determination.

news.headline: High Tide expands Cabana Club globally, covering US, EU, UK. Adds international snacks category to retail ecosystem.

This initiative sees the Cabana Club's reach expanding beyond Canada to encompass the entire United States, European Union, and United Kingdom. Additionally, the company has included the rapidly growing international snacks and confectionary category in its offerings.

news.headline: Dynepic® launches MOTAR® Ghost for enterprises/defense. Air-gapped with XR capabilities. Reno, Dec. 2, 2024. #Dynepic #MOTARGhost.
news.summary: Dynepic®, Inc. has introduced MOTAR® Ghost, a tailored version of its MOTAR platform, designed to enhance organizations' multidimensional capabilities and facilitate secure scaling of XR technologies. The official launch of MOTAR® Ghost was announced on Dec. 2, 2024, in Reno, Nevada. This air-gapped solution offers high customization and has received several awards.

news.headline: QinetiQ US wins $42M task order to develop advanced sensor tech for U.S. Army, aiding modernization efforts.
news.summary: The U.S. Army's modernization efforts are being boosted through the advancement of next-generation intelligent sensor and imaging capabilities thanks to a recent contract. This contract, awarded to QinetiQ US, spans four years and amounts to $42 million. The goal of this partnership is to support the U.S. Army Combat Capabilities Development.

news.headline: Sydbank repurchased shares in week 48 as part of buyback programme.
BRETT meme coin hits all-time high, reaches $2B market cap with $0.2342 before dropping to $0.20 amid Binance, Coinbase listing anticipation.
news.summary: In the past week, Brett (BRETT) emerged as a standout meme coin, surpassing the returns of popular blue-chip cryptocurrencies such as Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB). Brett saw a remarkable increase, gaining over 17% weekly, making it the top-performing meme coin with a market valuation above $1 billion. Reaching an all-time high of $0.2342 on Sunday, Brett achieved a market capitalization of $2 billion, subsequently dropping to $0.20. This surge was possibly driven by expectations of being listed on a major cryptocurrency exchange such as Binance or Coinbase. Notably, cryptocurrency trader Crash highlighted Brett's potential.

news.headline: China released a white paper on rural road development, sharing achievements and vision for the new era.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, the State Council Information Office in Beijing unveiled a white paper named "China's Rural Roads in the New Era." This document highlights the progress and future plans for rural road development in China, aiming to showcase the country's accomplishments and strategies in this sector. The white paper provides insights into the improvements made in rural infrastructure, emphasizing the importance of connectivity and accessibility in rural areas. This initiative reflects China's commitment to enhancing rural road networks to support economic growth and improve the quality of life for residents. The release of the white paper signals China's dedication to ongoing advancements in rural development and infrastructure.

news.headline: Global smart card IC market set to surpass US$ 5.2 billion by 2034. CAGR of 3.7% from 2024. Key players include NXP, Samsung, STMicroelectronics, Sony. Major growth driven by rising demand for secure authentication solutions. Contactless payment systems and smartphone transactions fueling expansion. Leading companies focusing on innovation and partnerships to stay competitive. Other players exploring sustainable manufacturing processes to meet demand for eco-friendly solutions.
news.summary: The global smart card IC market is experiencing significant growth, fueled by advancements in contactless payment systems and the increasing use of smartphones for secure transactions. Valued at US$3.5 billion in 2023, the market is expected to reach US$5.2 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 3.7%. Key players such as NXP Semiconductors, Samsung, STMicroelectronics, and Sony Corporation are investing in innovation and partnerships to maintain competitiveness. Recent developments include partnerships between NXP Semiconductors and Seco for IoT and AI solutions, as well as Samsung's focus on improving secure element chips for digital IDs. Other companies like Microchip Technology Inc. and Infineon Technologies AG are exploring sustainable manufacturing processes to meet the demand for eco-friendly smart card solutions. The market growth is driven by the rising demand for secure identification solutions across industries like BFSI, government, and healthcare.

news.headline: 27.5% of San Francisco hotel rooms struck, may impact holiday travel, UNITE HERE warns.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a significant percentage of hotel rooms, estimated at 27.5%, are currently impacted by strikes according to reports from the UNITE HERE union. These strikes are expected to persist throughout the holiday season, causing disruptions in the hospitality sector of the city.

XRP's price surges with record high open interest and market optimism, hinting at potential new all-time highs.

news.headline: EBL will reveal new brand identity and innovative power solutions at CES 2025 in Las Vegas from Jan 7-10, 2025. #SustainableEnergy #EBL #CES2025
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on December 2, 2024, EBL, a leading sustainable energy company dedicated to eco-friendly practices and reliability, shared its plans to reveal a fresh brand identity at CES 2025 in Las Vegas from January 7-10, 2025. This move underscores EBL's commitment to environmental preservation and innovation in the energy sector.

news.headline: AskGamblers introduces Live Scores feature providing live results, odds and statistics on football teams through world-class sportsbooks.
news.summary: AskGamblers has introduced a new Live Scores feature in collaboration with top online sportsbooks to enhance the betting experience. The feature includes live updates on football matches, odds, team statistics, and more. This initiative aims to provide bettors with real-time information and improve their engagement. The launch took place in COPENHAGEN, Denmark, marking a significant advancement in the platform's offerings.

news.headline: AV-Comparatives report reveals tips on fake shop detection for holiday shopping, protecting consumers from cyber fraud.
news.summary: A recently published report by AV-Comparatives provides insights and advice for detecting fraudulent online shops and fake shops. The report highlights the importance of cybersecurity products in safeguarding consumers. The data was released in INNSBRUCK, Austria on December 2, 2024. As online shopping continues to soar, consumers are increasingly vulnerable to cyber threats.

CleanSpark to reveal 2024 financial results in live webcast on December 2, 2024 (Nasdaq: CLSK).

This presentation will be broadcasted through a live webcast on December 2, 2024, after the market closes. The company's stakeholders and investors can tune in to gain insights into its financial standing and strategic direction moving forward.

news.headline: Small retailers are welcoming moves to reduce card transaction fees as they see it as a rising monthly cost passed to customers.
news.summary: Entrepreneurs report that charges for card transactions are increasingly becoming a significant monthly cost, which is frequently transferred to customers. They are expressing support for initiatives aimed at reducing these fees.
